content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -1.06%, PSU Bank -1.28% with VIX +2.5% to 17.04 — broad indices weak even as IT (+1.07%) and select stock-specific stories (post-Q4 winners) outperform. Today is a stock-pickers' tape, not a beta tape. Book is 61% deployed across 13 names with multiple Q4-winner positions running well; priority is to ratchet SLs on winners (COFORGE +8.3%, PNBHOUSING +10.2%) and trail to breakeven on names showing follow-through, not chase fresh breakouts at session highs.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+10.2% winner, CMP 1086.80, made fresh high 1095 today. Trailing SL from 1072.12 to 1058 — keeps ~2.7% gap below CMP (Rule 17 trail-gap discipline, well above 1% floor) while locking in ~7.5% gain from entry 984. Bullish Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, AUM Rs 90,921 Cr +13% YoY) intact; momentum continuation expected. Target 1135 unchanged near 52w high zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1335.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+8.3% winner on stellar Q4 (revenue +30%, FY26 +35.86%, $1.75bn order book). CMP 1368.70, current SL 1341.52 already locking ~6.5% above entry. Loosening SL slightly to 1335 is a no-go (would be loosening — rejected by guardrail). Keeping SL at 1341.52 — that gives ~2.0% gap below CMP, appropriate. Actually no MODIFY needed — current SL is good. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY — current SL 1341.52 already 2% below CMP 1368.70 and 6.5% above entry 1259. Tightening further would violate 1% trail-gap floor on a stock that just gapped +17%. Hold position, let breakout run toward target 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, -0.7% small loss. SL 121 = 2.6% below CMP 124.20, appropriate. VIX rising supports retention as portfolio hedge. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.9% with strong Q4 catalyst (PAT +18%, revenue +22%, fresh ATH). Moving SL from 818 to 820 = breakeven. Trail-gap: 820 vs CMP 828.20 = 1.0% — exactly at floor, acceptable for breakeven lock. Q4 fundamental tailwind plus FMCG rotation thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% gainer, CMP 3065.10. SL 3030 = 1.1% below CMP — already at trail-gap floor. Defence theme intact, NGC contract catalyst pending. Don't tighten further; let position breathe."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.1% winner, CMP 839.40, SL 825 = 1.7% below CMP — appropriate trail. Q4 strong (EBITDA margin 46.5% ATH, AUM +21% YoY). Target 875 close to 52w high 875 — letting it run. SL at 825 is breakeven+. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat -0.1%, just entered today. Q4 strong (PAT +37%, UVG 15.3%, EBITDA margin +280bps). SL 1445 = 3% below CMP 1491.30 — within risk budget. Letting thesis play; no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, just entered. Strong turnaround thesis (Q4 PAT Rs 164 Cr vs loss YoY, Zaynich NDA accepted by FDA). SL 1580 = 1.7% below CMP 1608.80 — fine. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, just entered. Q4 strong (FY26 PAT +47%). SL 2745 = 1.6% below CMP 2790.60. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, just entered post-Q4 record print. SL 9020 = 1.1% below CMP 9123.50, at trail-gap floor. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1%, Q4 PAT actually fell -17.4% YoY on exceptional charges. Defence revenue +46% but NA Class 8 truck cycle headwind real. SL 1955 = 2.2% below CMP 1999.50 — within budget. Hold to SL or thesis confirmation; do NOT preemptively close (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, just entered. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM +16% YoY. SL 354 = 2.6% below CMP 363.55. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, fresh entry post-Q4 (PAT +34%, buyback at Rs 12,000 announced). SL 10440 = 2.4% below CMP 10695. Hold; buyback record date is the catalyst."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1058.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1072.12 — wait, 1058 < 1072.12 would be loosening. Reversing: keep current SL 1072.12 (already 1.3% below CMP 1086.80, locks +8.9% gain). HOLD action — no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1341.52 = 2% below CMP, locks +6.5% gain. Adequate trail-gap; let breakout run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven 820 (currently 818). 1% gap below CMP 828.20 — exactly at floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; current SL 121 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "SL 3030 already at 1.1% trail-gap; do not tighten further."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 locks small gain, 1.7% below CMP — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Day-1 hold, SL 1445 within budget."
    },
    {

    },

    },

  "watchlist_notes": "PIDILITIND-related second-pass candidates explicitly walked through Rule 18 admission gate: (a) SRF/POLYCAB/CAMS/COFORGE/PNBHOUSING/MARICO already held — no add. (b) LAURUSLABS BULLISH +0.08, CMP 1225.90 at ATH after +5.3% — REJECT: extended; entry would chase +5% pop, R:R poor at these levels with 52w-high resistance immediately overhead. (c) GABRIEL NEUTRAL +0.03, Q4 board meeting May 13 (3 sessions away) — REJECT under Rule 11 binary-event discipline. (d) BAJAJ-AUTO already held. (e) WOCKPHARMA already held. (f) ABCAPITAL already held. (g) PIDILITIND already held. (h) NUVAMA +19.76% — REJECT: parabolic, unsuitable entry. (i) BHEL-cluster/Capital Goods — POLYCAB+GRSE already represent cluster. Net: book is 61% deployed across 13 names, watchlist exhausted of clean fresh entries that beat existing-position trail/management quality. Two pending OPEN orders (DABUR @ 487 and HFCL @ 133.50) — DABUR placed 350m ago, still waiting for fill on a stock now far above limit; HFCL placed 3415m ago (multi-day stale).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cancelling stale OPEN orders is overdue but no CANCEL primitive in this schema cycle — flagging for next opportunity. Deployment 61%, cash 39% (~Rs 391K) — appropriate for a CAUTIOUS-bias session with VIX rising. Today's P&L +1.25% driven by gap-up Q4 winners (COFORGE, PNBHOUSING, MARICO, CAMS). Discipline note: avoiding the trap of stacking new entries at session highs on names already in the book or on parabolic movers. Will revisit watchlist on tomorrow's open with fresh data."
}
